series_metadata.series_title: Filed Agency IT Resource Use Policies
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of IT resource use policies submitted to the Office of Information Technology by state agencies as required in Ohio IT Policy, ITP-E.8, "Use of Internet, E-mail and Other IT Resources"

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office area it is superseded or rescinded ; Electronic: Keep in operating system it is superseded or rescinded
